---
title: "API Reference"
description: "Full reference for every function and method in MyProject."
---

## `create(config?)`

Creates and returns a new app instance.

```ts
function create(config?: AppConfig): App
```

**Parameters**

- `config` *(optional)* — A partial `AppConfig` object. Defaults are applied for any missing keys.

**Returns** — An `App` instance.

---

## `app.run()`

Starts the application. Fires the `init` then `ready` lifecycle events.

```ts
app.run(): Promise<void>
```

---

## `app.on(event, handler)`

Registers a lifecycle event handler.

```ts
app.on(event: string, handler: Function): void
```

---

## `app.off(event, handler)`

Removes a previously registered handler.

```ts
app.off(event: string, handler: Function): void
```

---

## `app.once(event, handler)`

Registers a one-time handler that removes itself after firing.

```ts
app.once(event: string, handler: Function): void
```

---

## `app.lazy(loader)`

Lazily imports a module. Returns a Promise that resolves to the module.

```ts
app.lazy(loader: () => Promise<unknown>): Promise<unknown>
```

---

## `store(initial)`

Creates a reactive store.

```ts
function store<T>(initial: T): Store<T>
```

### Store methods

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `store.get()` | Returns the current state |
| `store.set(partial)` | Merges `partial` into state and notifies subscribers |
| `store.subscribe(fn)` | Registers a subscriber; returns an unsubscribe function |
| `store.reset()` | Resets state to the initial value |
